---
title: '<span style = "display:none;">Single Cell</span>'
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
site: workflowr::wflow_site
---

```{r include=T, echo=F}

htmltools::includeHTML("docs/adit/modules/modules.html")
htmltools::includeHTML("docs/adit/modules/sc.html")

```


<div style="clear: both;"></div>

```{=html}
<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-scrna">
  <a class="pipeline-title" href="#"></a>
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(SingleCell);</script>

<hr>

<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-scatac">
  <a class="pipeline-title" href="#"></a>
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(ATAC);</script>

<hr>

<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-vdj">
  <a class="pipeline-title" href="#"></a>
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(VDJ);</script>

<hr>

<div class="pipeline-wrap" id="pipeline-flow">
  <a class="pipeline-title" href="#"></a>
  <div class="pipe-skip-arc"></div>
  <div class="pipeline-flow"></div>
</div>
<script>renderPipeline(FlowCytometry);</script>

```

<br><hr>
